notes: OWASP Juice Shop is intentionally vulnerable. Spin up with: docker run --rm -p 3000:3000 bkimminich/juice-shop. Authorization to scan localhost is implicit when you run the image yourself.

expected_findings.description: SQL injection in login endpoint via email parameter
Horizontal privilege escalation on basket endpoint
Exposed FTP-style listing of sensitive files
Negative control — SSRF should not fire here
Negative control — no command injection on home page
